name: GoPay
description: GoPay — Indonesia digital wallet by GoTo Group supporting QR payments, bank transfers, and merchant integration via API.

seo.title: GoPay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: GoPay: GoPay — Indonesia digital wallet by GoTo Group supporting QR payments, bank transfers, and merchant integration via API.

when_to_use: GoPay QR and digital wallet payment acceptance for Indonesian merchants
Embedded GoTo wallet payment API for Indonesian fintech and apps
Bank transfer and wallet disbursement via GoPay API for Indonesian platforms
In-app payment via GoPay SDK for apps targeting Indonesian GoTo ecosystem

review.verdict: Must-support wallet for Indonesian merchants — pair it with a local gateway rather than using it standalone.
review.best_for: Merchants in Indonesia needing GoPay wallet acceptance alongside other methods
review.not_for: Non-Indonesian businesses or teams wanting a full gateway stack

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
